examples: The horse's mane can be washed at the same time as his body.
For some time he clung to the mane, that he might recover himself.
His face was permanently locked in an angry scowl under a shaggy mane of sandy hair.
Ainley has a thick white mane and a white mustache which spreads across his rugged face.
The silica that lines the bottom of the lagoon can turn your mane into straw unless you take precaution.
